title: st3gg_inventory_result
description: Evidence-only output of the ST3GG runtime inventory adapter (S1). Reports what the arms-length upstream stegg-cli exposes; it NEVER adjudicates truth. verdict is 'evidence_only' when the CLI ran, 'runtime_unavailable' when it is absent. It may never carry confirmed/allow/oracle/success.

runtime_digest.description: sha256 of the resolved CLI file, or null when unavailable
